# Not Rocket Science

> Danish software consultancy & product studio

Not Rocket Science ApS is a software consultancy and product studio based in Aarhus, Denmark, founded by Mathias Lynnerup Jakobsen. The company builds, advises, and invests in technology companies.

## Company Info

- **Legal name**: Not Rocket Science ApS
- **CVR**: DK42453951
- **Location**: Aarhus, Denmark
- **Email**: its@notrocketscience.dk
- **Website**: https://notrocketscience.dk

## Founder

Mathias Lynnerup Jakobsen — Software architect and builder.

## Projects & Ventures

- **JKBSN ApS** (https://mathiasjakobsen.dk) — Freelance software architect, engineer & developer
- **Efektive** (https://efektive.dk) — Investor & Fractional CTO
- **VoiceArchive** (https://voicearchive.com) — Board member
- **Mors™** — Coming soon
